title: Queue Flood Control
subtitle: Incident ingestion collapses during bursty traffic
objective: Separate ingestion from processing and prevent queue overload from stalling APIs.

concepts.title: Ingress Isolation
concepts.description: API should hand off work to queue quickly.

concepts.title: Worker Pipeline
concepts.description: Workers should drain queue and persist results.

concepts.title: Safe Front Door
concepts.description: Protect API tier with client -> load balancer routing.
